score_components.cohort_score: Rank-weighted membership in the 500 brightest, nearest, and highest proper-motion cohorts, plus a multi-cohort bonus.
score_components.visibility_score: Additional practical display impact from apparent magnitude, parallax distance, and total proper motion.
score_components.quality_score: Weighted Gaia and Hipparcos warning flags, capped at 30 points.
score_components.crossmatch_gap_score: Penalty for lacking official/FIS Gaia-HIP overlap, or for having only neighbourhood/local-supplemental context.

notes: Scores use only the systematic candidate cohorts and catalog quality/context signals.
Scores prioritize review effort, not astrophysical truth or override decisions.
